_doc: 近期重点新闻的人工策展入口。优先放 OpenHW 官方动态、RISC-V 官方/工作组动态、开源硬件项目发布和高质量技术文章。
_usage: 每次更新添加 3-7 条即可。必填: title/url/source/addedAt/summary/tags。可选: titleZh/summaryZh/sourceTier/language(en|zh|other)。构建时会合并进 news-digest.json。

items.title: RISC-V ISA Manual snapshot fixes Zca c.jal scope and Zvkt constant-time wording
items.titleZh: RISC-V ISA Manual 快照修正 Zca c.jal 范围与 Zvkt constant-time 表述
items.summary: RISC-V published a new ISA Manual snapshot from commit cc30642. The release clarifies that c.jal is only in XLEN=32 Zca, connects unprivileged and privileged cross-references, and fixes the Zvkt DIEL constant-time instruction list for vmslt[u].vv and vrsub.vi.
items.summaryZh: RISC-V 发布基于 commit cc30642 的 ISA Manual 新快照，明确 c.jal 只属于 XLEN=32 Zca，补上 unprivileged 与 privileged 章节交叉引用，并修正 Zvkt DIEL constant-time 指令列表中 vmslt[u].vv 与 vrsub.vi 的表述。

items.title: Caliptra FW 2.0.2 adds DPE upgrades, attested CSR, and FIPS hardening
items.titleZh: Caliptra FW 2.0.2 加入 DPE 升级、attested CSR 与 FIPS 强化
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance published Caliptra FW 2.0.2 as a combined runtime and FMC release for the 2.0 branch. It adds DPE SVN and crypto API work, DPE ML-DSA hybrid mode, attested CSR mailbox commands, ML-DSA/ECDH pairwise tests, richer firmware verification reporting, recovery capability updates, and fixes around production debug unlock, mailbox validation, AES-GCM GHASH state, FIPS marking, and shutdown zeroization.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 发布 Caliptra FW 2.0.2，这是面向 2.0 branch 的 runtime 与 FMC 组合发布；它加入 DPE SVN 与 crypto API 工作、DPE ML-DSA hybrid mode、attested CSR mailbox command、ML-DSA/ECDH pairwise test、更完整的 firmware verification 信息与 recovery capability 更新，并修复 production debug unlock、mailbox validation、AES-GCM GHASH 状态、FIPS 标记和 shutdown zeroization 相关问题。

items.title: Caliptra FW 2.1.1 updates certification, activation, debug unlock, and crypto tests
items.titleZh: Caliptra FW 2.1.1 更新 certification、activation、debug unlock 与 crypto tests
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance published Caliptra FW 2.1.1 as the latest combined runtime and FMC release. The 2.1 branch update adds SIGN_WITH_EXPORTED_MLDSA, chunked DPE certificates, initial activation handling, and more fw_info telemetry, while fixing debug-unlock mailbox behavior, ActivateFirmware authorization and bitmap handling, manifest metadata bounds, AES-GCM streaming GHASH state, runtime startup KAT coverage, ML-KEM/ML-DSA/ECDH pairwise tests, FIPS shutdown zeroization, and mailbox PAUSER checks.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 发布 Caliptra FW 2.1.1，这是最新的 runtime 与 FMC 组合发布；2.1 branch 更新加入 SIGN_WITH_EXPORTED_MLDSA、chunked DPE certificate、initial activation 处理和更多 fw_info telemetry，并修复 debug-unlock mailbox 行为、ActivateFirmware authorization 与 bitmap 处理、manifest metadata 边界、AES-GCM streaming GHASH 状态、runtime startup KAT 覆盖、ML-KEM/ML-DSA/ECDH pairwise test、FIPS shutdown zeroization 与 mailbox PAUSER 检查。

items.title: Chipyard 1.14.0 adds FireSim F2 support, Chisel 7 trials, and modular SoC builds
items.titleZh: Chipyard 1.14.0 加入 FireSim F2 支持、Chisel 7 试用与模块化 SoC 构建
items.summary: Chipyard 1.14.0 is a broad RISC-V SoC generator release with AWS F2 support for FireSim, limited Chisel 7.13.0 support, modular lite builds, multichip and CTC improvements, Zephyr RTOS support, early Radiance/GPU integration, new FPGA/config examples, and updated Rocket Chip, BOOM, Shuttle, Saturn, Spike, Gemmini, and related submodules.
items.summaryZh: Chipyard 1.14.0 是一次覆盖面很广的 RISC-V SoC generator 发布，加入面向 FireSim 的 AWS F2 支持、有限的 Chisel 7.13.0 支持、模块化 lite build、多芯片与 CTC 改进、Zephyr RTOS 支持、早期 Radiance/GPU 集成、新 FPGA/config 示例，并更新 Rocket Chip、BOOM、Shuttle、Saturn、Spike、Gemmini 等子模块。

items.title: Apache TVM introduces TIRx as an open hardware-native DSL for frontier ML kernels
items.titleZh: Apache TVM 推出 TIRx：面向前沿 ML kernel 的开放硬件原生 DSL
items.summary: Apache TVM introduced TIRx, an open-source hardware-native DSL and compiler stack for ML kernels, shipping with the Apache TVM 0.25.0 Python package, documentation, a community kernel library, benchmarks, and course material for expert-written, agent-generated, and megakernel-style accelerator code.
items.summaryZh: Apache TVM 推出 TIRx，这是面向 ML kernel 的开源硬件原生 DSL 与编译器栈；它随 Apache TVM 0.25.0 Python package、文档、社区 kernel library、benchmark 与课程材料一起发布，服务 expert-written、agent-generated 与 megakernel 风格的加速器代码。

items.title: CIRCT firtool 1.150.0 expands ImportVerilog, FIRRTL, Synth, ESI, and Arc flows
items.titleZh: CIRCT firtool 1.150.0 扩展 ImportVerilog、FIRRTL、Synth、ESI 与 Arc 流程
items.summary: CIRCT published firtool 1.150.0 with substantial open EDA compiler updates, including ImportVerilog support for use-before-declare, builtins, DPI export declarations, plusargs, assertions, and declaration handling; FIRRTL lowering and domain fixes; Synth and comb lowering work; ESI runtime improvements; and Arc coroutine lowering.
items.summaryZh: CIRCT 发布 firtool 1.150.0，包含一批开源 EDA 编译器更新：ImportVerilog 支持 use-before-declare、builtins、DPI export declaration、plusargs、assertion 与声明处理；同时改进 FIRRTL lowering/domain、Synth 与 comb lowering、ESI runtime，以及 Arc coroutine lowering。

items.title: Caliptra ROM 2.0.3 hardens shutdown, entropy, and debug-unlock handling
items.titleZh: Caliptra ROM 2.0.3 强化 shutdown、entropy 与 debug unlock 处理
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance published Caliptra ROM 2.0.3 for the 2.0 branch, adding SS_STRAP_GENERIC[2] entropy-source configuration and CTR_DRBG-AES-256 plus MLDSA-87 KAT coverage, while fixing ROM shutdown zeroization, CSRNG health-test behavior, production debug unlock binding, boot-failure reporting, and FIPS marking around hash-based ECDSA/LMS verification.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 发布 Caliptra ROM 2.0.3（2.0 branch），新增 SS_STRAP_GENERIC[2] entropy source 配置以及 CTR_DRBG-AES-256、MLDSA-87 KAT 覆盖；同时修复 ROM shutdown zeroization、CSRNG health-test 行为、production debug unlock 绑定、boot failure 上报，以及 hash-based ECDSA/LMS verification 的 FIPS 标记。

items.title: Caliptra ROM 2.1.2 updates owner-key, ICCM verification, and recovery controls
items.titleZh: Caliptra ROM 2.1.2 更新 owner key、ICCM verification 与 recovery 控制
items.summary: Caliptra ROM 2.1.2 adds Stable Owner Key derivation from the HEK seed and gates fatal-error reporting on the recovery reset strap, with fixes for firmware verification after ICCM load, entropy and CSRNG setup, production debug unlock rejection, ROM shutdown zeroization, OCP LOCK key-ladder use of DOE, and identity root-key write locks.
items.summaryZh: Caliptra ROM 2.1.2 新增从 HEK seed 派生 Stable Owner Key，并通过 recovery reset strap gate fatal error reporting；修复内容覆盖 ICCM load 后固件验证、entropy 与 CSRNG 配置、production debug unlock 拒绝条件、ROM shutdown zeroization、OCP LOCK key ladder 使用 DOE，以及 identity root key write-lock。

items.title: Caliptra Subsystem 2.0.2 doc release clarifies collateral without RTL changes
items.titleZh: Caliptra Subsystem 2.0.2 文档发布澄清配套资料且不改 RTL
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance released a documentation-only Caliptra Subsystem 2.0.2 collateral update that explicitly leaves the RTL design unchanged, follows the Caliptra subsystem release checklist, drops the volatile PK hash lock from the spec, and cherry-picks documentation clarifications from main.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 发布 Caliptra Subsystem 2.0.2 的 documentation-only collateral update，明确不修改底层 RTL 设计；该发布遵循 Caliptra subsystem release checklist，移除 spec 中的 volatile PK hash lock，并从 main cherry-pick 多项文档澄清。

items.title: RISC-V International unpacks SHD Group's 2026 market forecast methodology
items.titleZh: RISC-V International 解读 SHD Group 2026 市场预测方法
items.summary: RISC-V International interviewed SHD Group on its 2026 RISC-V Market Analysis, explaining a top-down/bottom-up model across nearly 60 applications, 12 device types per system, and more than 70 ecosystem interviews, with headline 2031 forecasts of 35.9 billion RISC-V SoC units and $318 billion in associated revenue.
items.summaryZh: RISC-V International 采访 SHD Group，解释其 2026 RISC-V Market Analysis 的方法：覆盖近 60 个应用、每个系统 12 类器件的 top-down/bottom-up 模型，并结合 70 多次生态访谈；报告给出的 2031 年 headline forecast 为 359 亿颗 RISC-V SoC 出货量和 3180 亿美元相关收入。

items.title: Apache TVM v0.25.0 lands Relax, frontend, TIR, runtime, and CI updates
items.titleZh: Apache TVM v0.25.0 发布，更新 Relax、frontend、TIR、runtime 与 CI
items.summary: Apache TVM v0.25.0 is a final release, not an RC, with broad compiler/runtime maintenance across Relax, frontend importers, TIR analysis and scheduling, runtime backends, and developer workflow updates since v0.24.0.
items.summaryZh: Apache TVM v0.25.0 是 final release（不是 RC），汇总了自 v0.24.0 以来在 Relax、frontend importer、TIR 分析与调度、runtime backend，以及开发流程方面的大量编译器和运行时维护更新。

items.title: Apache TVM FFI v0.1.12 advances its open ABI for ML systems
items.titleZh: Apache TVM FFI v0.1.12 推进面向 ML systems 的开放 ABI
items.summary: Apache TVM FFI v0.1.12 adds reflection, Rust macro fixes, C-ABI-oriented AnyView changes, tensor API alignment, and ROCm/PyTorch DLPack loader fixes for the project's open ABI and framework-agnostic FFI layer for ML systems.
items.summaryZh: Apache TVM FFI v0.1.12 为面向 ML systems 的开放 ABI 与跨框架 FFI 层加入 reflection、Rust macro 修复、面向 C ABI 的 AnyView 改动、tensor API 对齐，以及 ROCm/PyTorch DLPack loader 修复。

items.title: Antmicro runs Gemma 4 on its open hardware Jetson AGX Thor baseboard with Kenning
items.titleZh: Antmicro 在开源 Jetson AGX Thor baseboard 上用 Kenning 运行 Gemma 4
items.summary: Antmicro benchmarked Gemma 4 variants on its open hardware NVIDIA Jetson AGX Thor baseboard, using the open-source Kenning framework with llama.cpp to generate performance reports for embedded edge-AI deployment.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 在其开源 NVIDIA Jetson AGX Thor baseboard 上测试 Gemma 4 多个模型，并使用开源 Kenning 框架与 llama.cpp 生成性能报告，展示面向嵌入式 edge-AI 部署的开放硬件与软件栈。

items.title: FOSSi highlights ODE4EC's three-year push for open-source European chip design
items.titleZh: FOSSi 关注 ODE4EC 三年开放欧洲芯片设计计划
items.summary: FOSSi's El Correo Libre Issue 98 says ODE4EC has begun as a three-year effort to strengthen Europe's open chip-design environment, with AMS, digital EDA, and productivity/verification projects for open EDA, open IP, and open PDK workflows.
items.summaryZh: FOSSi 的 El Correo Libre 第 98 期介绍 ODE4EC 已启动：这是一个为期三年的欧洲开放芯片设计环境计划，覆盖 AMS、数字 EDA，以及生产力与验证工具项目，目标是推动开放 EDA、开放 IP 与开放 PDK 流程。

items.title: RVV study compares GCC 15 and Clang 21 on portable RISC-V vector performance
items.titleZh: RVV 研究比较 GCC 15 与 Clang 21 的 RISC-V vector 可移植性能
items.summary: A KTH, Lawrence Livermore, and Barcelona Supercomputing Center paper uses RVV 1.0 microbenchmarks on BananaPi-F3 and other RISC-V vector hardware to compare GCC 15 and Clang 21, finding GCC more stable across most scientific and ML proxy workloads while exposing remaining compiler and profiling gaps.
items.summaryZh: KTH、Lawrence Livermore 与 Barcelona Supercomputing Center 的论文使用 BananaPi-F3 等 RISC-V vector 硬件上的 RVV 1.0 microbenchmark 比较 GCC 15 与 Clang 21，发现 GCC 在多数科学计算与 ML proxy workload 上更稳定，同时暴露出编译器与性能分析工具仍需改进。

items.title: MLCommons publishes MLPerf Training v6.0 results for sparse MoE workloads
items.titleZh: MLCommons 发布 MLPerf Training v6.0 结果，聚焦 sparse MoE workload
items.summary: MLCommons released MLPerf Training v6.0 results with new DeepSeek V3 and GPT-OSS 20B sparse MoE benchmarks, reporting 95 unique systems across thirteen hardware accelerators and broader cloud/on-premise training submissions.
items.summaryZh: MLCommons 发布 MLPerf Training v6.0 结果，新增 DeepSeek V3 与 GPT-OSS 20B sparse MoE benchmark，并报告 95 个独立系统、13 类硬件加速器，以及更广泛的云端与本地训练系统提交。

items.title: Qualcomm reportedly weighs a Tenstorrent acquisition for RISC-V AI silicon
items.titleZh: 报道称 Qualcomm 正评估收购 Tenstorrent，以强化 RISC-V AI silicon 布局
items.summary: Tom's Hardware, citing The Information, reported that Qualcomm has discussed acquiring Tenstorrent at an $8 billion to $10 billion valuation. The report is unconfirmed, but it is relevant to the open hardware brief because Tenstorrent's RISC-V-based AI accelerators and data-center CPU IP sit at the center of the rumored rationale.
items.summaryZh: Tom's Hardware 援引 The Information 报道称，Qualcomm 曾讨论以 80 亿至 100 亿美元估值收购 Tenstorrent。该交易尚未确认，但对开源硬件简报有参考价值，因为报道中的核心理由正是 Tenstorrent 基于 RISC-V 的 AI accelerator 与数据中心 CPU IP。

items.title: Antmicro adds host-controller support to the CHIPS Alliance open-source I3C Core
items.titleZh: Antmicro 为 CHIPS Alliance 开源 I3C Core 加入 host-controller 支持
items.summary: Antmicro described Host Controller support for the CHIPS Alliance open-source I3C Core, connecting the IP to Caliptra, Guineveer, the VeeR EL2 RISC-V core, and AXI-based SoC building blocks for more reusable open peripheral fabrics.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 介绍了为 CHIPS Alliance 开源 I3C Core 实现 Host Controller 支持的工作，并将该 IP 与 Caliptra、Guineveer、VeeR EL2 RISC-V core 以及基于 AXI 的 SoC building block 串联起来，增强开放外设互连与复用能力。

items.title: OpenHW highlights EOSA webinar on Europe's open-source hardware ecosystem
items.titleZh: OpenHW 关注 EOSA 欧洲开源硬件生态 webinar
items.summary: OpenHW promoted the European Open Source Academy webinar on the open-source hardware ecosystem, featuring OpenHW Group, RISC-V International, CERN, and Barcelona Supercomputing Center voices on European open hardware collaboration and adoption.
items.summaryZh: OpenHW 介绍了 European Open Source Academy 关于开源硬件生态的 webinar，参与方包括 OpenHW Group、RISC-V International、CERN 与 Barcelona Supercomputing Center，主题聚焦欧洲开源硬件协作与采用。

items.title: OpenHW spotlights the inaugural RISC-V Ottawa community launch
items.titleZh: OpenHW 关注 RISC-V Ottawa 首次社区启动会议
items.summary: OpenHW highlighted the inaugural RISC-V Ottawa launch meeting, with Mike Thompson covering the open-source RISC-V ecosystem, Frederic Desbiens covering open-source RTOSes, and attendees shaping local project directions.
items.summaryZh: OpenHW 介绍 RISC-V Ottawa 首次启动会议：Mike Thompson 将分享开源 RISC-V 生态，Frederic Desbiens 将介绍开源 RTOS，参与者还将共同讨论本地项目方向。

items.title: CHIPS Alliance Latch-Up recap connects SV Tools, Verilator, VeeR, and open PDK work
items.titleZh: CHIPS Alliance Latch-Up 回顾串联 SV Tools、Verilator、VeeR 与开放 PDK 工作
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance's Latch-Up 2026 recap packages technical updates on SV Tools, UVM and four-state logic work in Verilator, VeeR/Guineveer open-source SoC flows, and IHP open PDK and MPW progress.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 的 Latch-Up 2026 回顾集中呈现 SV Tools、Verilator 中的 UVM 与四态逻辑进展、VeeR/Guineveer 开源 SoC 流程，以及 IHP 开放 PDK 与 MPW 进展。

items.title: MLCommons releases MLPerf Mobile v6.0 with on-device LLM benchmarks
items.titleZh: MLCommons 发布 MLPerf Mobile v6.0，加入端侧 LLM benchmark
items.summary: MLCommons released MLPerf Mobile v6.0 with generative AI tests for Llama 3.2 1B/3B and Llama 3.1 8B on Android devices, plus NPU-accelerated Llama 3.1 8B support on Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 and updated MediaTek Dimensity 9500 and Samsung Exynos 2600 coverage.
items.summaryZh: MLCommons 发布 MLPerf Mobile v6.0，为 Android 设备加入基于 Llama 3.2 1B/3B 与 Llama 3.1 8B 的生成式 AI 测试，并增加 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 上的 Llama 3.1 8B NPU 加速支持，同时更新 MediaTek Dimensity 9500 与 Samsung Exynos 2600 覆盖。

items.title: OpenHW uses RISC-V Summit Europe 2026 to showcase CVA6, CORE-ET, UAP, and Eclipse collaboration
items.titleZh: OpenHW 在 RISC-V Summit Europe 2026 展示 CVA6、CORE-ET、UAP 与 Eclipse 协作
items.summary: OpenHW Foundation joined RISC-V Summit Europe 2026 in Bologna as a Silver Sponsor, highlighting CVE2, CVE4, and CVA6 roadmap discussions, a CVA6 tech meetup covering Rigoletto and Tristan verification, the Unified Access Platform for EU RISC-V artifacts, and the newly announced CORE-ET silicon platform.
items.summaryZh: OpenHW Foundation 以 Silver Sponsor 身份参加 Bologna 的 RISC-V Summit Europe 2026，集中展示 CVE2、CVE4 与 CVA6 路线讨论，围绕 Rigoletto 和 Tristan verification 的 CVA6 tech meetup，面向欧盟 RISC-V artifact 的 Unified Access Platform，以及新近宣布的 CORE-ET 硅平台。

items.title: RISC-V Summit Europe posters show CVA6 momentum in CFI, secure boot, safety, and real-time designs
items.titleZh: RISC-V Summit Europe poster 显示 CVA6 在 CFI、安全启动、功能安全与实时设计上的进展
items.summary: The Summit Europe 2026 poster program includes multiple CVA6-focused results: CVA6-CFI integrates the RISC-V Zicfiss and Zicfilp CFI extensions with 1.0% 22 nm FDX area overhead, while other posters cover CVA6-based secure boot with DICE and post-quantum cryptography, CAGE-V confidential computing, fault-tolerant CVA6, and CVA6-RT real-time extensions.
items.summaryZh: Summit Europe 2026 的 poster program 包含多项 CVA6 相关成果：CVA6-CFI 将 RISC-V Zicfiss 与 Zicfilp CFI 扩展集成到 CVA6，并给出 22 nm FDX 下 1.0% 面积开销；其他 poster 还覆盖基于 CVA6 的 secure boot、DICE 与 post-quantum cryptography、CAGE-V confidential computing、fault-tolerant CVA6，以及 CVA6-RT 实时扩展。

items.title: OpenHW points to Eclipse ThreadX poster work for first-class RISC-V RTOS support
items.titleZh: OpenHW 关注 Eclipse ThreadX poster，推动 RISC-V 上的一流 RTOS 支持
items.summary: OpenHW highlighted the RISC-V Summit Europe poster by Eclipse Foundation's Frederic Desbiens and 10xEngineers' Akif Ejaz on elevating Eclipse ThreadX into a first-class RTOS for RISC-V, connecting OpenHW's hardware focus with Eclipse's embedded software stack.
items.summaryZh: OpenHW 转发了 Eclipse Foundation 的 Frederic Desbiens 与 10xEngineers 的 Akif Ejaz 在 RISC-V Summit Europe 的 poster，主题是将 Eclipse ThreadX 提升为 RISC-V 上的一流 RTOS，体现 OpenHW 硬件生态与 Eclipse 嵌入式软件栈之间的连接。

items.title: OpenTitan publishes first Earl Grey 1.0.0 development bundle
items.titleZh: OpenTitan 发布首个 Earl Grey 1.0.0 development bundle
items.summary: lowRISC published the first OpenTitan development bundle for Earl Grey 1.0.0, packaging FPGA bitstreams, a Verilated simulation binary, OpenTitanTool, HSMTool, test ROM, and FPGA ROM extension binaries for bring-up and integration work.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 发布了面向 Earl Grey 1.0.0 的首个 OpenTitan development bundle，打包 FPGA bitstream、Verilated simulation binary、OpenTitanTool、HSMTool、test ROM 以及 FPGA ROM extension binary，便于 bring-up 与集成工作。

items.title: Antmicro outlines Yocto-based open hardware stack for NVIDIA Jetson edge AI
items.titleZh: Antmicro 介绍面向 NVIDIA Jetson 边缘 AI 的 Yocto 与开源硬件栈
items.summary: Antmicro connected NVIDIA's Jetson Yocto support with its own open source hardware baseboards, meta-antmicro Yocto layers, RDFM OTA and fleet management, Kenning AI benchmarking, and Protoplaster factory testing stack for reproducible edge-AI product development.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 将 NVIDIA Jetson 的 Yocto 支持与自家的开源硬件 baseboard、meta-antmicro Yocto layer、RDFM OTA 与 fleet management、Kenning AI benchmark，以及 Protoplaster 工厂测试栈串联起来，面向可复现的边缘 AI 产品开发。

items.title: FOSSi opens ORConf 2026 registration for its European open silicon conference
items.titleZh: FOSSi 开放 ORConf 2026 注册，聚焦欧洲 open silicon 社区
items.summary: FOSSi Foundation opened registration for ORConf 2026, scheduled for September 11-13 at the Zebrastraat event center in Ghent, Belgium, and co-located with FPL 2026. Talk submissions are open until August 16 for open-source silicon, EDA, FPGA, IP, and verification work.
items.summaryZh: FOSSi Foundation 已开放 ORConf 2026 注册；会议计划于 9 月 11-13 日在比利时 Ghent 的 Zebrastraat event center 举行，并与 FPL 2026 同地举办。面向开源硅、EDA、FPGA、IP 与 verification 工作的演讲投稿开放到 8 月 16 日。

items.title: CHIPS Alliance recaps OCP EMEA work across Caliptra, OpenPRoT, and VeeR
items.titleZh: CHIPS Alliance 回顾 OCP EMEA 上的 Caliptra、OpenPRoT 与 VeeR 协作
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance's OCP EMEA Summit recap highlights collaboration with the Open Compute Project around Caliptra, OpenPRoT, and Guineveer/VeeR EL2, including root-of-trust and open-source silicon infrastructure themes relevant to data-center security hardware.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 的 OCP EMEA Summit 回顾强调其与 Open Compute Project 围绕 Caliptra、OpenPRoT 以及 Guineveer/VeeR EL2 的协作，重点覆盖 root-of-trust 与开源硅基础设施，对数据中心安全硬件方向具有参考价值。

items.title: Fraunhofer AISEC becomes an official OpenTitan security testing partner
items.titleZh: Fraunhofer AISEC 成为 OpenTitan 官方安全测试伙伴
items.summary: lowRISC announced that Fraunhofer AISEC joined the OpenTitan coalition as an official security testing partner, adding independent physical attack evaluation, side-channel and fault-injection expertise, and assurance work around the Earl Grey secure microcontroller.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 宣布 Fraunhofer AISEC 作为官方安全测试伙伴加入 OpenTitan 联盟，将为 Earl Grey 安全微控制器带来独立的物理攻击评估、side-channel 与 fault-injection 专业能力，以及更系统的安全 assurance 工作。

items.title: Antmicro makes its open hardware Jetson Orin baseboard directly available through System Designer
items.titleZh: Antmicro 通过 System Designer 直接提供开源硬件 Jetson Orin baseboard
items.summary: Antmicro announced that its open hardware baseboard for the NVIDIA Jetson Orin family is available for direct purchase through System Designer, with schematics, assets, customization paths, and AI edge-development use cases presented as part of the platform.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 宣布，其面向 NVIDIA Jetson Orin 系列的开源硬件 baseboard 已可通过 System Designer 直接购买，并提供 schematics、设计资产、定制路径以及面向边缘 AI 开发的使用场景。

items.title: Realtek joins the OpenTitan coalition to build discrete hardware root-of-trust devices
items.titleZh: Realtek 加入 OpenTitan 联盟，推进离散式硬件 root-of-trust 器件开发
items.summary: lowRISC and Realtek announced that Realtek has joined the OpenTitan project as a coalition partner and plans to use OpenTitan's platform-agnostic IP, firmware, and verification collateral to develop discrete hardware root-of-trust devices for networking, telecom, and IoT products.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 与 Realtek 宣布，Realtek 已作为联盟伙伴加入 OpenTitan 项目，并计划基于 OpenTitan 平台无关的 IP、firmware 与 verification collateral，面向网络、通信和 IoT 产品开发离散式硬件 root-of-trust 器件。

items.title: Ainekko's CORE-ET edge AI silicon platform becomes an OpenHW Foundation project
items.titleZh: Ainekko 的 CORE-ET 边缘 AI 硅平台成为 OpenHW Foundation 开源项目
items.summary: Ainekko announced that its CORE-ET Silicon Platform has been accepted as an OpenHW Foundation project. The platform combines many-core 64-bit RISC-V compute, MRAM-based memory, a scalable NoC, an architecture emulator, and open tooling for low-power edge AI inference.
items.summaryZh: Ainekko 宣布其 CORE-ET Silicon Platform 已被 OpenHW Foundation 接收为开源项目。该平台结合 many-core 64-bit RISC-V compute、MRAM-based memory、可扩展 NoC、architecture emulator 与开放工具链，面向低功耗边缘 AI 推理。

items.title: Chisel v7.13.0 released with ChiselTest compatibility and FIRRTL 7 backend updates
items.titleZh: Chisel v7.13.0 发布，带来 ChiselTest 兼容层与 FIRRTL 7 后端更新
items.summary: Chisel v7.13.0 adds a ChiselTest compatibility layer for Chisel 7, debug intrinsics for Chisel type metadata, and bumps the FIRRTL backend to 7.0.0 while carrying several core fixes and documentation updates.
items.summaryZh: Chisel v7.13.0 新增面向 Chisel 7 的 ChiselTest compatibility layer、用于 Chisel type metadata 的 debug intrinsic，并将 FIRRTL backend 升级到 7.0.0，同时包含多项 core fix 与文档更新。

items.title: Yosys 0.66 released with Lattice Nexus DSP inference and GateMate synthesis updates
items.titleZh: Yosys 0.66 发布，加入 Lattice Nexus DSP inference 与 GateMate 综合更新
items.summary: Yosys 0.66 adds the lattice_dsp_nexus pass for Lattice Nexus DSP inference, extends synth_gatemate with a scopename option propagated to flatten, and moves the project baseline toward C++20 with a future CMake migration planned.
items.summaryZh: Yosys 0.66 新增 lattice_dsp_nexus pass，用于 Lattice Nexus DSP inference；同时为 synth_gatemate 增加可传递到 flatten 的 scopename option，并将项目基线推进到 C++20，后续计划迁移到 CMake。

items.title: Fraunhofer AISEC joins OpenHW Foundation to advance secure CVA6/OpenTitan platforms
items.titleZh: Fraunhofer AISEC 加入 OpenHW Foundation，推进基于 CVA6 与 OpenTitan 的安全平台
items.summary: Fraunhofer AISEC joined the OpenHW Foundation and described work on a secure SoC built around the RISC-V CVA6 core and OpenTitan root-of-trust platform, with GyroidOS already running on a CVA6 FPGA reference platform.
items.summaryZh: Fraunhofer AISEC 宣布加入 OpenHW Foundation，并介绍其围绕 RISC-V CVA6 core 与 OpenTitan root-of-trust 平台开发安全 SoC 的工作；其 GyroidOS 已运行在采用 CVA6 core 的 FPGA 参考平台上。

items.title: OpenTitan details its pre-silicon security simulation and verification flow
items.titleZh: OpenTitan 详解其 pre-silicon 安全仿真与验证流程
items.summary: lowRISC outlined how OpenTitan validates side-channel and fault-injection countermeasures before tape-out, combining open-source tooling such as CocoAlma and PROLEAD with formal and simulation-based flows to catch vulnerabilities earlier in the security lifecycle.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 介绍了 OpenTitan 在 tape-out 前如何验证 side-channel 与 fault-injection countermeasure：将 CocoAlma、PROLEAD 等开源工具与 formal、simulation-based flow 结合，在安全开发生命周期更早阶段发现漏洞。

items.title: Antmicro brings IEEE-compliant force/release statement support to Verilator
items.titleZh: Antmicro 为 Verilator 带来更接近 IEEE 规范的 force/release statement 支持
items.summary: Antmicro detailed a runtime force-tracking implementation for Verilator that supports conditional and overlapping SystemVerilog force/release statements more closely aligned with IEEE 1800-2023, with the work included in Verilator 5.048.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 介绍了 Verilator 中基于 runtime force tracking 的实现，使其能更好支持 SystemVerilog 中 conditional 与 overlapping force/release statement，并更接近 IEEE 1800-2023 规范；相关工作已进入 Verilator 5.048。

items.title: Real Intent joins OpenTitan as tools partner for static sign-off and verification
items.titleZh: Real Intent 加入 OpenTitan，成为 static sign-off 与验证工具合作伙伴
items.summary: lowRISC announced that Real Intent has joined the OpenTitan coalition as an official tools partner, adding access to static sign-off tools for hardware security, linting, clock-domain crossing, and reset-domain crossing checks.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 宣布 Real Intent 加入 OpenTitan 联盟并成为官方工具合作伙伴，为 OpenTitan 工程社区带来 hardware security、linting、CDC 与 RDC 等 static sign-off 工具支持。

items.title: Cadence joins OpenTitan as a tools partner for open-source silicon security
items.titleZh: Cadence 加入 OpenTitan，成为开源硅安全项目工具合作伙伴
items.summary: lowRISC announced that Cadence has joined the OpenTitan coalition as an official tools partner, bringing enterprise EDA support across verification, formal analysis, synthesis, and physical implementation for OpenTitan designs.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 宣布 Cadence 加入 OpenTitan 联盟并成为官方工具合作伙伴，为 OpenTitan 设计在验证、形式化分析、综合和物理实现等环节提供企业级 EDA 支持。

items.title: RISC-V International launches a single library for ratified specifications
items.titleZh: RISC-V International 推出统一的已批准规格文档库
items.summary: RISC-V International introduced the Ratified Specifications Library, a consolidated site for ratified RISC-V specifications in HTML and PDF formats, designed to replace scattered repository and draft-page discovery paths.
items.summaryZh: RISC-V International 推出 Ratified Specifications Library，将已批准的 RISC-V 规格以 HTML 和 PDF 形式集中呈现，减少过去分散在多个仓库和草稿页面中的查找成本。

items.title: RISC-V International highlights a performance-model-driven superscalar CVA6 effort
items.titleZh: RISC-V International 介绍基于性能模型推进 superscalar CVA6 的工作
items.summary: RISC-V International featured Thales' work on a cycle-based Python performance model for CVA6, used to guide a dual-issue CVA6 implementation and improve CoreMark/MHz with modest power and area overhead.
items.summaryZh: RISC-V International 介绍了 Thales 围绕 CVA6 建立 cycle-based Python 性能模型的工作，用它指导 dual-issue CVA6 实现，并在较小功耗与面积开销下提升 CoreMark/MHz。

items.title: Yosys 0.65 released with arithmetic tree and Verilog frontend updates
items.titleZh: Yosys 0.65 发布，带来 arithmetic tree 与 Verilog 前端更新
items.summary: Yosys 0.65 adds an arith_tree pass for converting add/sub/macc chains to carry-save adder trees, removes the share -force option, and improves read_verilog support for positional assignment patterns for unpacked arrays.
items.summaryZh: Yosys 0.65 新增 arith_tree pass，可将 add/sub/macc 链转换为 carry-save adder tree；同时移除 share -force option，并改进 read_verilog 对 unpacked array positional assignment pattern 的支持。

items.title: CIRCT firtool-1.149.0 adds lower-to-core FIRRTL printing, SimToSV fixes, and broader ESI runtime support
items.titleZh: CIRCT firtool-1.149.0 发布，带来 lower-to-core FIRRTL 打印、SimToSV 修复与更广泛的 ESI runtime 支持
items.summary: The latest CIRCT firtool release adds lower-to-core support for firrtl.fprintf, several SimToSV lowering fixes, larger-than-64-bit integral support in the ESI runtime, Windows cosim improvements, and new synthesis and equivalence-checking updates.
items.summaryZh: 最新 CIRCT firtool 版本加入 firrtl.fprintf 的 lower-to-core 支持，修复多项 SimToSV lowering 问题，为 ESI runtime 增加大于 64 位整数支持，改进 Windows cosim，并带来新的综合与等价检查更新。

items.title: OpenTitan publishes its physical security testing framework for pre- and post-silicon validation
items.titleZh: OpenTitan 发布其物理安全测试框架，覆盖 pre-silicon 与 post-silicon 验证
items.summary: lowRISC detailed OpenTitan's open physical security testing framework, which coordinates side-channel and fault-injection evaluation from FPGA-based pre-silicon analysis through post-silicon certification and is wired into CI to catch regressions in the security validation flow.
items.summaryZh: lowRISC 详细介绍了 OpenTitan 的开放式物理安全测试框架：它将 side-channel 与 fault-injection 评估从基于 FPGA 的 pre-silicon 分析延伸到 post-silicon 认证，并接入 CI 以发现安全验证流程中的回归问题。

items.title: Antmicro adds a genetic-algorithm resynthesis path to OpenROAD
items.titleZh: Antmicro 为 OpenROAD 增加基于 genetic algorithm 的重综合路径
items.summary: Antmicro described a genetic-algorithm-based local resynthesis strategy for OpenROAD that complements simulated annealing, exposing tunable search parameters and showing cases where targeted tuning improves timing and power on selected OpenROAD-flow-scripts designs.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 介绍了面向 OpenROAD 的 genetic algorithm 本地重综合策略，作为 simulated annealing 的补充；该方法开放可调搜索参数，并展示了在部分 OpenROAD-flow-scripts 设计上通过定向调参改善时序与功耗的案例。

items.title: Antmicro reaches an initial four-state logic milestone in Verilator
items.titleZh: Antmicro 推进 Verilator 四值逻辑支持，达到初始里程碑
items.summary: Antmicro outlined an experimental four-state logic implementation for Verilator under a --fourstate flag, using paired two-state variables internally so open-source ASIC and FPGA teams can debug X and Z behavior with fewer blind spots.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 介绍了 Verilator 中实验性的四值逻辑实现：通过 `--fourstate` 开关启用，并在内部使用成对的二值变量表示，从而帮助开源 ASIC 与 FPGA 团队更好地调试 X、Z 行为。

items.title: OCP expands its open data center ecosystem for AI with new cluster, networking, and chiplet contributions
items.titleZh: OCP 通过新的集群、网络与 chiplet 贡献扩展开源 AI 数据中心生态
items.summary: OCP announced newly approved AI infrastructure contributions spanning Open Rack Wide, Ethernet-based AI cluster reference architectures, facility power and telemetry work, and the Foundation Chiplet System Architecture, extending its open 'chip to grid' roadmap for AI deployments.
items.summaryZh: OCP 宣布多项面向 AI 基础设施的新批准贡献，覆盖 Open Rack Wide、基于以太网的 AI 集群参考架构、机房电力与遥测工作以及 Foundation Chiplet System Architecture，进一步扩展其面向 AI 部署的开放“从 chip 到 grid”路线图。

items.title: MLCommons Chakra expands its standardized trace ecosystem for AI systems co-design
items.titleZh: MLCommons Chakra 扩展面向 AI 系统协同设计的标准化 trace 生态
items.summary: MLCommons reported that Chakra has grown into a 40-plus-member effort with execution-trace support in PyTorch, NVIDIA NeMo, vLLM, ASTRA-sim, and commercial simulators, giving AI hardware and infrastructure teams a more portable way to benchmark and co-design training and inference systems.
items.summaryZh: MLCommons 表示 Chakra 已发展成拥有 40 多家成员的协作项目，execution trace 已支持 PyTorch、NVIDIA NeMo、vLLM、ASTRA-sim 以及商业模拟器，为 AI 硬件与基础设施团队提供更可移植的 benchmark 与协同设计方法。

items.title: Apache TVM v0.24.0 ships compiler, runtime, and CI modernization updates
items.titleZh: Apache TVM v0.24.0 发布，带来编译器、运行时与 CI 现代化更新
items.summary: Apache TVM v0.24.0 bundles broad fixes across code generation and runtime backends while adding fresh architecture documentation and modernizing developer workflows with uv-based Python dependency management and a GitHub Actions lint path.
items.summaryZh: Apache TVM v0.24.0 汇总了 code generation 与 runtime backend 的多项修复，同时补充新的架构文档，并通过基于 uv 的 Python 依赖管理和 GitHub Actions lint 流程推进开发工作流现代化。

items.title: MLCommons adds GPT-OSS 20B as a sparse MoE pretraining benchmark for MLPerf Training v6.0
items.titleZh: MLCommons 为 MLPerf Training v6.0 增加 GPT-OSS 20B sparse MoE 预训练 benchmark
items.summary: MLCommons described GPT-OSS 20B, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts pretraining benchmark for MLPerf Training v6.0 designed to run on a single 8-GPU node while testing MoE routing, sparse computation, and hardware/software training efficiency.
items.summaryZh: MLCommons 介绍 GPT-OSS 20B，这是面向 MLPerf Training v6.0 的 sparse Mixture-of-Experts 预训练 benchmark，目标是在单个 8-GPU 节点上测试 MoE routing、稀疏计算以及硬件/软件训练效率。

items.title: Antmicro adds Renode support for RISC-V Andes D25F-based ChromiumOS FPMCU testing
items.titleZh: Antmicro 为基于 RISC-V Andes D25F 的 ChromiumOS FPMCU 测试加入 Renode 支持
items.summary: Antmicro expanded simulation-based testing for Google's ChromiumOS fingerprint firmware module by adding Renode support for an Egis ET171 platform based on the RISC-V Andes D25F core and Zephyr RTOS.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 扩展了 Google ChromiumOS 指纹固件模块的仿真测试能力，为基于 RISC-V Andes D25F core 与 Zephyr RTOS 的 Egis ET171 平台加入 Renode 支持。

items.title: FOSSi publishes Mike Thompson's Latch-Up talk on RISC-V in space
items.titleZh: FOSSi 发布 Mike Thompson 关于 RISC-V in Space 的 Latch-Up 演讲
items.summary: FOSSi published Mike Thompson's Latch-Up 2026 talk, "RISC-V in Space (The Canadian version)". The talk describes a Canadian effort with the University of Saskatchewan and collaborators to fabricate an open-source RISC-V chip, radiation-harden the design, and build a space-ready chip; the MCU is based on OpenHW Foundation's CV32E40P.
items.summaryZh: FOSSi 发布了 Mike Thompson 在 Latch-Up 2026 的演讲 “RISC-V in Space (The Canadian version)”。该演讲介绍加拿大团队与 University of Saskatchewan 等合作伙伴从开源 RISC-V core 出发完成 silicon、进行抗辐照加固，并推进 space-ready chip；其中 MCU 基于 OpenHW Foundation 的 CV32E40P。

items.title: Gemmini v0.7.1 adds rectangular convolutions and new Timeloop configurations
items.titleZh: Gemmini v0.7.1 加入矩形卷积支持与新的 Timeloop 配置
items.summary: Gemmini v0.7.1 is an incremental accelerator release that adds rectangular convolution support, ships new Timeloop configurations, improves area for runtime-configurable dataflows, and speeds up build and elaboration time.
items.summaryZh: Gemmini v0.7.1 是一次增量版本更新，加入对矩形卷积的支持，提供新的 Timeloop 配置，改善运行时可配置数据流的面积表现，并缩短构建与 elaboration 时间。

items.title: Docker on RISC-V reaches near-release parity in six days with native RISC-V64 builds
items.titleZh: Docker on RISC-V 在六天内实现接近正式版本的原生 RISC-V64 交付
items.summary: RISC-V International highlighted a community pipeline that brought Docker v29 to RISC-V64 within six days of release using native RISC-V hardware builds for Docker Engine, CLI, Compose, and Buildx.
items.summaryZh: RISC-V International 介绍了一个社区维护的交付流水线：在 Docker v29 发布后六天内，利用原生 RISC-V 硬件完成 Docker Engine、CLI、Compose 与 Buildx 的 RISC-V64 构建与发布。

items.title: OpenHW publishes CV32A60X 6.0.0 configuration release for TRL5 work
items.titleZh: OpenHW 发布面向 TRL5 工作的 CV32A60X 6.0.0 配置版本
items.summary: The OpenHW CVA6 repository published CV32A60X 6.0.0 as a dedicated configuration release, adding an OBI-based pipeline hierarchy, removing caches and PMP entries, and improving coverage, lint results, and configuration documentation.
items.summaryZh: OpenHW 在 CVA6 仓库发布了面向特定配置的 CV32A60X 6.0.0 版本，引入基于 OBI 的 pipeline hierarchy，移除 caches 与 PMP entries，并改进 coverage、lint 结果与配置文档。

items.title: RISC-V Architecture Tests 4.0.0 released
items.titleZh: RISC-V Architecture Tests 发布 4.0.0
items.summary: ACT 4.0 is a major update to the RISC-V Architecture Certification Test suite, replacing the older riscof/riscv-ctg/riscv-isac/riscv-config flow with a new Python-based flow.
items.summaryZh: ACT 4.0 是 RISC-V 架构认证测试套件的一次重要升级，用新的 Python-based flow 取代旧的 riscof/riscv-ctg/riscv-isac/riscv-config 流程。

items.title: MLPerf Inference v6.0 expands GPT-OSS and DeepSeek-R1 LLM benchmarks
items.titleZh: MLPerf Inference v6.0 扩展 GPT-OSS 与 DeepSeek-R1 LLM benchmark
items.summary: MLCommons detailed new MLPerf Inference v6.0 workloads for GPT-OSS 120B and a latency-constrained DeepSeek-R1 interactive scenario, including speculative decoding requirements and reference implementation links.
items.summaryZh: MLCommons 介绍 MLPerf Inference v6.0 中面向 GPT-OSS 120B 与 DeepSeek-R1 interactive 场景的新 workload，包含延迟约束、speculative decoding 要求，以及参考实现链接。

items.title: Antmicro implements dual-core lockstep support for CHIPS Alliance VeeR EL2
items.titleZh: Antmicro 为 CHIPS Alliance VeeR EL2 实现 dual-core lockstep 支持
items.summary: Antmicro described an optional dual-core lockstep feature for VeeR EL2, including shadow-core behavior, multibit control encoding, error reporting, and cocotb/PyUVM-based verification.
items.summaryZh: Antmicro 介绍了 VeeR EL2 的可选 dual-core lockstep 功能，包括 shadow core 行为、多 bit 控制编码、错误报告，以及基于 cocotb/PyUVM 的验证方式。

items.title: OCP introduces Foundation Chiplet System Architecture for open chiplet interoperability
items.titleZh: OCP 介绍 Foundation Chiplet System Architecture，推动开放 chiplet 互操作
items.summary: OCP described Foundation Chiplet System Architecture as a CPU-architecture-neutral framework for chiplet systems, defining common chiplet classes and hardware/fabric-level interface expectations under the Open Chiplet Economy initiative.
items.summaryZh: OCP 将 Foundation Chiplet System Architecture 描述为面向 chiplet 系统、CPU 架构中立的框架，在 Open Chiplet Economy 计划下定义常见 chiplet 类型以及硬件/互连层面的接口预期。

items.title: CHIPS Alliance launches the SV Tools Project for SystemVerilog/UVM codebases
items.titleZh: CHIPS Alliance 推出 SV Tools Project，聚合 SystemVerilog/UVM 开源工具
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance introduced the SV Tools Project to improve visibility and support for open-source SystemVerilog and UVM tooling, including sv-tests, Verible, Synlig, and RISCV-DV.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 推出 SV Tools Project，聚合 sv-tests、Verible、Synlig、RISCV-DV 等开源 SystemVerilog/UVM 工具，提升工具链可见度和维护支持。

items.title: Caliptra RTL v2.1.2 patch release published
items.titleZh: Caliptra RTL 发布 v2.1.2 patch release
items.summary: Caliptra RTL v2.1.2 is a patch release for Caliptra 2.1 RTL, including AES countermeasure and Key Vault hardening plus a future-use ML-KEM Key Vault endianness fix.
items.summaryZh: Caliptra RTL v2.1.2 是 Caliptra 2.1 RTL 的 patch release，包含 AES countermeasure、Key Vault 加固，以及面向未来使用模型的 ML-KEM Key Vault 端序修复。

items.title: OpenHW Foundation launches Unified RISC-V IP Access Platform under TRISTAN
items.titleZh: OpenHW Foundation 在 TRISTAN 项目下推出 Unified RISC-V IP Access Platform
items.summary: OpenHW announced the Unified RISC-V IP Access Platform as part of TRISTAN, positioning it as a unified source for verified, industry-ready RISC-V components and related open-source artifacts.
items.summaryZh: OpenHW 在 TRISTAN 项目下宣布 Unified RISC-V IP Access Platform，目标是集中呈现已验证、面向产业使用的 RISC-V 组件和相关开源资产。

items.title: CHIPS Alliance details modular RISC-V SoC design with Topwrap and Guineveer
items.titleZh: CHIPS Alliance 介绍 Topwrap 与 Guineveer 的模块化 RISC-V SoC 设计流程
items.summary: CHIPS Alliance described an open digital design flow using Topwrap and Guineveer, a RISC-V reference SoC based on the VeeR EL2 core, for modular and reusable SoC construction.
items.summaryZh: CHIPS Alliance 介绍了使用 Topwrap 与 Guineveer 的开放数字设计流程；Guineveer 是基于 VeeR EL2 的 RISC-V reference SoC，用于模块化、可复用的 SoC 构建。
